label: Psychic ritual role
description: Defines a role that pawns can fill in a psychic ritual, including eligibility conditions and invocation behavior.

allowedCount.label: Allowed count
allowedCount.description: Number of pawns that may fill this role. Written as min~max.

allowedConditions.label: Allowed conditions
allowedConditions.description: Condition flags indicating states in which a pawn is still permitted to fill this role. A pawn in a state whose bit is absent from this mask is disqualified.

canHandleOfferings.label: Can handle offerings
canHandleOfferings.description: Whether a pawn in this role can contribute offerings to the ritual.

psychicRitualWaitsForArrival.label: Ritual waits for arrival
psychicRitualWaitsForArrival.description: Whether the ritual waits for the pawn in this role to arrive before starting.

showInvocationVfx.label: Show invocation VFX
showInvocationVfx.description: Whether the pawn in this role displays the invocation visual effect.

applyPowerOffset.label: Apply power offset
applyPowerOffset.description: Whether the pawn's psychic sensitivity contributes to the ritual power offset.

removeOnLost.label: Remove on lost
removeOnLost.description: Whether the pawn is removed from the ritual when the role assignment is lost.
